title: Let's talk about your next project
subtitle: Tell me what you need and I'll reply with a clear, viable proposal focused on results.

form.title: Write to me
form.description: I respond to inquiries about web development, interfaces, architecture and digital products.

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Tell me about your project, goals, timeline and any important details.

validation.messageMin: Tell me a bit more, at least 20 characters.

status.successDescription: Thanks for reaching out. I will reply as soon as possible.
status.errorDescription: Please try again in a few minutes.

servicesSubtitle: Three work streams to build solid, fast and scalable experiences.

services.title: Product and Launch
